reviews.review_msg: In my 3 years I have never come across a prof who cared solittle. And I say this coming from a student who had an A+ till getting curved down and he never bothered to give us our final marks back. Threatened to give us a C- and had no lecture curriculum or anything. And he made 70% of our grade attendance while not taking attendance and blamed us.

Taken Spring 2025: He seems incredibly disconnected from the task of teaching. There was almost no structure when I took the class and he was just coming up with it on the fly... I heard this year it somehow got worse and near the end of term he offered students a C if they left and never talk to him again. Just wild behaviour. Funny guy tho.
